description: Aave v4 fork compiled at solc 0.8.34, tracking solx compile times (solc profiles available for manual runs). Compiles src only (--no-tests): the Foundry test contracts instantiate Hub/SpokeInstance, re-embedding them into legacy compilation jobs past the per-file via-IR overrides. EVM_DISABLE_MEMORY_SAFE_ASM_CHECK lets solx spill SpokeInstance's stack-too-deep despite the memory-unsafe assembly in the vendored OZ Arrays.sol (unannotated; upstream OZ marks those blocks memory-safe).

download solx and warm caches.command: npx hardhat compile --build-profile solx --no-tests && npx hardhat clean
